goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { s.contains(x0) implies -k0 <= x0 and x0 <= k0 } }

not bound < bound2

function(x0: Real, x1: Real, x2: Real) { not x0 <= x1 or x0 + x2 <= x1 + x2 }(y, bound, 1)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x0: Real) { closure(s).contains(x0) implies -k0 <= x0 and x0 <= k0 } }
proof: function(x0: Real) { not (x0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ closure(s) or (-x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) }) }(bound2)
function(x0: Real) { not forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ closure(s) or (-x0 <= x1 and x1 <= x0) } or not x0 > 0 }(bound2)
let w0: Real satisfy { w0 ∈ closure(s) and (not -bound2 <= w0 or not w0 <= bound2) }
function(x0: Real) { not x0 ∈ closure(s) or (-bound2 <= x0 and x0 <= bound2) }(w0)
function(x0: Set[Real]) { exists(k0: Real) { k0 > 0 and forall(x1: Real) { not x1 ∈ x0 or (-k0 <= x1 and x1 <= k0) } } = is_bounded_real_set(x0) }(closure(s))
